body:
To update for the AMIP/CMIP environment split in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1775. For now I left in the experiments/ClimaEarth/ environment in ClimaCoupler.jl so downstream tests don't break, but it will be removed soon.

## Content
- [x] `experiments/ClimaEarth/` --> `experiments/AMIP/`
- [x] `experiments/AMIP/test/runtests.jl` --> `experiments/test/runtests.jl`
title: update ClimaCoupler env for downstream test

body:
The bug was first seen in ClimaLand and it is documented in CFTime.jl repository at https://github.com/JuliaGeo/CFTime.jl/issues/70.

Previously, `read_available_dates` called `reinterpret` with `NCDatasets.DateTimeStandard` as the target type. In CFTime v0.2.7, this stopped working. The fix is to reinterpret directly into `Dates.DateTime` instead, which is the type ultimately returned by the function anyway.
title: Fix `read_available_dates` bug with CFTime v0.2.7
